betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pre-Nuclear Age§f

§aBridge the gap between oil processing and nuclear technology — master advanced materials, automation, and nuclear fuel processing!§f

With your intermediate oil refinery and catalytic cracking tower up and running, you now have access to the petrochemical products needed for the next stage of progression. The pre-nuclear age covers everything between basic oil processing and building your first nuclear reactor.

§6Key Areas§f:
§b• Materials§f: §bSilicon§f for advanced circuits, §bFiberglass§f for insulation
§b• Automation§f: §bConveyors§f, §bPneumatic Tubes§f, §bTransport Drones§f and §bLogistics Drones§f
§b• Machines§f: §bGas Centrifuge§f for isotope separation, §bFEL§f and §bSILEX§f for laser enrichment, §bRT Generator§f for passive power
§b• Processing§f: §bHydrogen Peroxide§f and §bMercury§f for advanced chemistry
§b• Nuclear Materials§f: §bUranium§f and §bPlutonium§f enrichment chains, §bMOX Fuel§f

§eTip§f: This questline branches into several independent paths. The §bSilicon§f branch unlocks advanced circuits which enable most machines. The §bGas Centrifuge§f and §bSILEX§f chains prepare you for nuclear fuel processing. You can tackle these in any order, but Silicon is the most common prerequisite.
